common.noVehicles: No vehicles available for your selected dates. Try adjusting your pickup or drop-off times.

explore.title: When do you need the car?
explore.heroSubtitle: Tailored for rideshare and gig drivers in Riyadh. No upfront payment. Instant reservation. Get on the road today.
explore.whySubtitle: Optimized for drivers who mean business.
explore.whyInsuredDesc: All rentals include commercial rideshare insurance as standard.
explore.whyFleetDesc: Modern, fuel-efficient, and clean vehicles that passengers love.
explore.whyFlexDesc: Rent by the day, week, or month. No long-term commitments required.
explore.bookingCardSubtitle: Pick a start day and shift to find the right car for your next run.
explore.popularCarsSubtitle: Start with real options, then refine by timing only when needed.

results.title: Available Vehicles
results.subtitle: Refined options for Riyadh drivers, with live pricing based on your selected pickup and drop-off window.
results.readyForShift: Cars ready for your next shift
results.readyForShiftSubtitle: Browse the strongest matches for your booking window, then open a vehicle to review pricing and request it.
results.emptyTitle: No cars matched this booking window
results.todayUnavailableTitle: No shifts left today for this car
results.todayUnavailableSubtitle: No shifts are left today for this car. Try tomorrow or choose another day to continue.
results.selectionUnavailableSubtitle: Choose another shift or switch the day to continue your booking request.
results.cardDescription: Commercial-ready availability in {city}, with a daily rate from {dailyRate} SAR and booking review tailored to your selected rental period.
results.bookingDisclaimer: No payment is required now. This booking is subject to admin approval.
results.confirmSubtitle: Check the car, adjust the booking day or shift, and submit your request for ZEVO team approval.
results.vehicleDetailIntro: Lowest running cost, fast pickup, and the easiest entry point for a full-day shift in Riyadh.
results.modifyBookingSubtitle: Adjust the booking day or switch the shift before sending the request.
results.finalizeSubtitle: Review the final details before sending your booking for approval.
results.bookingSummarySubtitle: This request is sent to ZEVO operations for manual review and confirmation.
results.nextStepsItem1: Your request is reviewed by the ZEVO team.
results.nextStepsItem2: You receive a confirmation call with pickup details.
results.nextStepsItem3: Payment is finalized only after approval.
results.vehiclePriceSummary: Live pricing for the exact timing you selected.
results.promoTitle: Are you an Uber or Careem driver?
results.promoDesc: Get special weekly rates and maintenance support designed specifically for gig-economy professionals.

promoPoints.weeklyRates: Weekly pricing designed for high-mileage drivers
promoPoints.fastApproval: Faster handoff for returning professional drivers

bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.empty: No bookings yet. Browse available cars to get started.
bookings.emptyHintActive: Once a request is sent or approved, it will show up here with timing and support actions.
bookings.emptyHintPast: Completed and cancelled rentals will appear here once your booking history starts to build.
bookings.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking? This action cannot be undone.
bookings.approvedMessage: Approved! We'll contact you to arrange pickup.
bookings.confirmationSubtitle: Your request has been received and is pending admin review. We'll contact you shortly to finalize the details.
bookings.nextStepsItem1: Our team will review your request within 24 hours.
bookings.nextStepsItem2: You'll receive a call to confirm the pickup details and complete the paperwork.
bookings.nextStepsItem3: Head to our office at the scheduled time to collect the vehicle and finalize payment.
bookings.pageSubtitle: Track active requests, confirmed pickups, and completed rentals.
bookings.summaryActiveHint: Requests that still need your attention.
bookings.activeSectionHint: Keep an eye on approvals, pickup timing, and support access for every open booking.
bookings.pastSectionHint: Review recently completed or cancelled rentals in one place.
bookings.startHint: Pickup window opens at this time.
bookings.endHint: Return timing currently recorded on the booking.

statusPanel.pendingBody: Your booking is in the approval queue. ZEVO will confirm timing and contact you once the branch is ready.
statusPanel.approvedBody: Your request is approved. Keep your documents ready and arrive close to the pickup time for a faster handoff.
statusPanel.activeBody: This rental is currently active. If anything changes during the trip, support is one tap away.
statusPanel.completedBody: This rental has been closed successfully and remains here as part of your booking history.
statusPanel.cancelledBody: This request is no longer active. You can browse available cars whenever you're ready to book again.

validation.phone: Please enter a valid Saudi phone number (05XXXXXXXX).

errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.

auth.notAdmin: This account does not have admin access.
auth.notDriver: This account is not a driver account.
auth.unauthenticated: You must be logged in to continue.

otp.rateLimit: Too many OTP requests. Please try again later.
otp.rateLimitWithRetry: Too many OTP requests. Please wait {seconds} seconds before trying again.
otp.expired: The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
otp.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please request a new code.
otp.nameRequired: Name is required for new accounts.
otp.requestFailed: Failed to send OTP. Please try again.

booking.pickupInPast: Pickup time cannot be in the past.
booking.dropoffBeforePickup: Drop-off time must be after pickup.
booking.carUnavailable: Sorry, this vehicle was just booked for your selected dates. Please choose a different vehicle or adjust your dates.
booking.pendingLimitReached: You already have 2 pending requests. Please wait for admin review or cancel an existing request.
booking.approveInvalidState: Only pending bookings can be approved.
booking.approveConflict: This vehicle has a conflicting booking.
booking.rejectInvalidState: Only pending bookings can be rejected.
booking.cancelInvalidState: This booking cannot be cancelled in its current state.
booking.dispatchInvalidState: Only approved bookings can be dispatched.
booking.returnInvalidState: Only active bookings can be returned.
booking.odometerInvalid: Incoming odometer must be greater than or equal to the outgoing odometer.
booking.chargesNoteRequired: A note is required when additional charges are applied.

car.plateDuplicate: This plate number is already registered to another vehicle.
